choose icon at the bottom right corner

"rel-bounds": [18, 80, 1159, 955], "focused": false, "selected": false, "scrollable-vertical": true, "children": [{"text": "

I understand that the audios, articles, and other info are for personal information only and should not be construed as professional advice, therapy, or instruction. 

I understand that if I am under 13, I should use this app with the guidance and approval of a parent.

 I understand there is no guarantee of validity or accuracy and no action or inaction should be taken based solely on the contents of this information. 

I understand that I should consult an appropriate health professional on any matter relating to my health and well-being. 

I understand that the information and tools contained in this app are not meant to replace a skilled professional but should be used under the guidance of a mental health professional. 

I understand that the screening tests are not diagnostic and I should have a proper medical diagnosis before assuming that what I am experiencing is a diagnosable condition. 

I understand that the information in the assistance audio and transcript is directed at the thinking that occurs with that condition and may not apply to other conditions or problems. 

I understand that the relaxation audios should not be listened to while driving or any other activity in which I should be alert. 

I understand that the app developer collects usage data to improve this app to enhance my experience. It will not be released to anyone. No identifying info is collected. The only location info that is obtained is country of residence. I may opt out of sending this data in Menu>Settings. 

I understand that although the Android backup service is enabled for this app, there is no guarantee that the data will be saved. I am also responsible for enabling the settings on my device for this service. 

I understand that although I may save my data to the SD card, there is no guarantee that the data will be saved. I am responsible for restoring data when I re-install the app. 

I understand that I can read Excel At Life's full Terms of Use and Privacy Policy on the website by tapping the logo at the top of this screen. I agree to these terms of use.

I understand that if I am under 13, I should use this app with the guidance and approval of a parent.

 I understand there is no guarantee of validity or accuracy and no action or inaction should be taken based solely on the contents of this information. 

I understand that I should consult an appropriate health professional on any matter relating to my health and well-being. 

I understand that the information and tools contained in this app are not meant to replace a skilled professional but should be used under the guidance of a mental health professional. 

I understand that the screening tests are not diagnostic and I should have a proper medical diagnosis before assuming that what I am experiencing is a diagnosable condition. 

I understand that the information in the assistance audio and transcript is directed at the thinking that occurs with that condition and may not apply to other conditions or problems. 

I understand that the relaxation audios should not be listened to while driving or any other activity in which I should be alert.

I understand that although the Android backup service is enabled for this app, there is no guarantee that the data will be saved. I am also responsible for enabling the settings on my device for this service. 

I understand that although I may save my data to the SD card, there is no guarantee that the data will be saved. I am responsible for restoring data when I re-install the app.
